Records.description: Two-loop family of Feynman integrals $J^{mM}_{b_1 b_2 b_3 a_1 a_2}$ arising in the matching of QCD to NRQCD, defined in Eq. (2.1) with three mass-$m$ propagators and two mass-$M$ propagators, external kinematics $q_1^2=q_2^2=0$, $q_1.q_2=2 m^2$ (so $p=(q_1+q_2)/2$ satisfies $p^2=m^2$). IBP reduction yields 9 master integrals $J_1..J_9$ listed after Eq. (2.1). $J_1, J_2, J_9$ are obtained by direct Feynman-parameter integration; $J_3..J_8$ are computed analytically in closed form exact in $d$ via the Frobenius method applied to their differential equations, yielding combinations of $_3F_2$ and $_4F_3$ hypergeometric functions (Sections 2 and 4). Section 3 provides integral representations expanded at fixed $d$ through canonical DE and iterated integrals (polylogarithmic and elliptic II-type kernels, see Appendix A). The Frobenius/hypergeometric representation is exact in epsilon (all-orders).
